Bus Timings

Jubail Bus Station in Sharjah: Essential Information for Travelers

August 13, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Al Jubail Bus Station in Sharjah is a key transit point for travelers in the region, offering reliable and convenient bus services connecting to various destinations across the UAE.

Address

2D, Bujair Bin Abi Bujair Street, Al Jubail, Al Qasimiah, Sharjah United Arab Emirates

View Google directions here.

Located in Al Qasimiah, Jubail Bus Station is a crucial transit hub in Sharjah’s transportation network. Its proximity to shopping centers, government buildings, and dining options makes it a convenient and well-situated stop for both local commuters and visitors.

Bus Routes and Timings

Al Jubail Bus Station provides a number of important routes, ensuring that passengers can travel efficiently to their destinations. The station services the following key bus routes:

Bus Route Destination
117 Al Jubail Bus Terminal - Abu Dhabi
E306 Ghubaiba Bus Stn - Al Jubail Bus Stn

Bus Route Details

  • Bus Route 117: Connects Al Jubail Bus Terminal in Sharjah to Abu Dhabi, providing frequent services throughout the day.

  • Bus Route E306: Runs between Ghubaiba Bus Station in Dubai and Al Jubail Bus Station in Sharjah, offering reliable transportation at regular intervals.

These routes run frequently throughout the day, providing flexibility for travelers heading to or from Sharjah, whether for work or leisure.

Nearby Destinations

Al Jubail Bus Station is conveniently situated near a variety of local amenities, providing travelers with easy access to restaurants, hotels, shopping centers, and important landmarks. Whether you’re looking for a quick meal or exploring nearby cultural sites, the surrounding area has plenty to offer.

Restaurants

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

  • Janatha Restaurant: A popular spot serving traditional dishes.

  • China Club: Known for its authentic Chinese cuisine.
  • The Pub: A casual dining option for those looking to relax.

Accommodation

  • Africana Hotel: A comfortable option for travelers looking for convenient lodging.

  • Al Jawhara Metro Hotel: Offers modern accommodations near key transport links.
  • Comfort Inn Hotel: Provides cozy and affordable rooms for short stays.

Landmarks

  • Dubai Land Department: An important government institution nearby.

  • British Embassy: A prominent diplomatic mission in the area.
  • Dubai Municipality: A major government office located close to the station.

Shopping Centers

  • Al Ghurair Centre: A well-known shopping destination offering a wide range of retail options.

  • Souk Al Wasl: A traditional market with a variety of goods and local products.
  • Twin Towers: A popular shopping and business center in the area.

Nearby Stops

  1. Sharjah, Al Jubail Bus Station 2(112m): E303, E307, E307A

  2. Sharjah, King Faisl Rd, Old Gold Souq(347m): E303, E306, E307, E307A

Al Jubail Bus Station in Sharjah serves as a major transit hub, offering easy access to local attractions and neighboring emirates. Whether you’re traveling within Sharjah or exploring further afield, Al Jubail Bus Station provides a smooth and reliable way to navigate the region.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: August 13, 2025.

Written by Al Khaleej
